title: Luxury Home Cinematic Tour
description: Premium residential property showcase with smooth dolly shots and golden hour lighting

prompt.main: Cinematic real estate tour beginning with sweeping drone approach over manicured landscape. Camera glides through front entrance revealing grand foyer with chandelier catching sunlight. Smooth dolly through living spaces showcasing high ceilings, designer furnishings, natural light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows. Kitchen reveal with slow pan across marble countertops, professional appliances gleaming. Master suite entrance with soft focus transition, bathroom featuring freestanding tub with garden views. Conclude with sunset terrace shot, city lights beginning to twinkle in distance.

elements.cameraMovement: Stabilized gimbal movements, slow dollies, gentle crane shots, smooth transitions between rooms
elements.subject: Luxury residential property with high-end finishes and designer staging
elements.scene: Upscale neighborhood, manicured grounds, sophisticated interior design
elements.motion: Flowing camera movements, no sudden cuts, parallax through architectural elements
elements.lighting: Golden hour exterior, bright natural interior light, strategic accent lighting
elements.atmosphere: Aspirational luxury, warmth, sophistication, lifestyle appeal
elements.style: Architectural Digest meets Hollywood production value

modifiedElements.scene: Restored historic property with period details

bestPractices: Maintain consistent speed throughout camera movements
Highlight unique selling points of the property
Show flow between spaces naturally
Include both wide establishing shots and intimate details

title: Commercial Office Space Showcase
description: Modern workspace tour emphasizing productivity, collaboration, and amenities

prompt.main: Professional office tour starting with aerial establishing shot of glass-facade building. Elevator doors open to reveal modern reception with company branding. Camera tracks through open-plan workspace showing ergonomic stations, natural light, collaborative zones. Conference room with city views, state-of-the-art presentation technology. Amenity tour: fully equipped kitchen, relaxation areas, outdoor terrace. Highlight sustainable features: solar panels, green walls, energy-efficient systems. End with time-lapse of space filling with productive professionals, building energy visualization showing efficiency.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth tracking shots, elevator perspectives, walk-through POV, aerial establishing
elements.subject: Modern commercial office space with premium amenities and sustainable features
elements.scene: Corporate building, contemporary design, bustling business district
elements.motion: Professional pace, purposeful movements, dynamic time-lapse elements
elements.lighting: Bright office lighting, natural daylight, LED accent lighting

modifiedElements.scene: Creative workspace with gaming areas, colorful design

bestPractices: Show the space during 'golden hours' of productivity
Include people to demonstrate scale and usage
Highlight technological integration naturally
Emphasize both individual and collaborative spaces

title: Virtual Staging Transformation
description: Empty room to fully furnished space with magical transitions and particle effects

prompt.main: Begin with empty room, bare walls, natural light creating shadows on hardwood floors. Magical transformation begins: furniture materializes with particle effects, sofa assembling from geometric shapes. Walls receive virtual paint with color washing across surfaces. Art pieces fade into existence, rugs unroll themselves. Kitchen cabinets fill with dishware appearing like holograms solidifying. Bedroom transforms with bed rising from floor, pillows fluffing themselves. Outdoor space gains patio furniture, plants growing in time-lapse. Each room reveals multiple style options morphing seamlessly: modern to traditional to eclectic.

elements.cameraMovement: Orbital movements during transformations, push-ins for reveals, match cuts between styles
elements.subject: Empty property transformed through virtual staging technology
elements.scene: Vacant home becoming fully furnished living space
elements.motion: Particle effects, morphing transitions, materialization animations
elements.lighting: Consistent natural light with virtual shadows matching furniture
elements.style: Tech demo meets interior design visualization

modifiedElements.motion: Rapid style changes in same space

modifiedElements.subject: Progressive staging from basic to premium

bestPractices: Ensure furniture scale is accurate to room dimensions
Match lighting and shadows realistically
Show multiple style options to demonstrate flexibility
Keep transitions smooth and visually appealing

title: Neighborhood Lifestyle Montage
description: Community features, local amenities, and lifestyle benefits showcase

prompt.main: Sunrise over peaceful neighborhood, drone revealing tree-lined streets. Morning joggers on community trails, children walking to nearby school. Vibrant farmer's market with fresh produce, locals chatting. Quick cuts: coffee shop, bookstore, art gallery, restaurants. Park scenes with families, dogs playing, outdoor yoga class. Community pool, tennis courts, fitness center in use. Shopping district with boutiques, pedestrian-friendly walkways. Evening: outdoor dining, string lights, live music in town square. Sunset over homes, porch lights beginning to glow, sense of belonging.

elements.cameraMovement: Mix of aerial, handheld community feel, smooth transitions between locations
elements.subject: Neighborhood amenities, community life, local attractions
elements.scene: Vibrant community with diverse amenities and active lifestyle
elements.motion: Dynamic editing, lifestyle vignettes, authentic movement
elements.lighting: Natural daylight progression, golden hour community warmth

bestPractices: Include diverse demographics to show inclusive community
Capture authentic moments rather than staged scenes
Show seasonal variety if possible
Highlight unique local features that differentiate the area

title: Construction Progress Time-lapse
description: Complete building process from groundbreaking to finished structure

prompt.main: Empty lot with surveying equipment, groundbreaking ceremony moment. Excavators carving foundation, concrete trucks pouring. Time-lapse: foundation walls rising, rebar grids expanding. Steel frame assembly, workers moving like ants, cranes swinging beams. Floors adding sequentially, building growing skyward. Exterior walls, window installation reflecting sky. Interior work glimpses: electrical, plumbing, insulation. Facade materials applied, architectural details emerging. Landscaping transformation, paths appearing, trees planted. Final touches: signage, lighting tests. Grand opening with ribbon cutting, people entering completed building.

elements.cameraMovement: Fixed time-lapse positions, occasional drone flyovers, detail insert shots
elements.subject: Construction site evolving into completed building
elements.scene: Active construction site through all phases
elements.motion: Accelerated time-lapse, normal speed for key moments

bestPractices: Maintain consistent camera position for true time-lapse effect
Include human element to show scale
Capture different weather conditions for visual interest
Show both macro progress and micro details

title: Interior Design Portfolio Reel
description: Showcase of multiple design projects with style transitions and detail focus

prompt.main: Elegant title card dissolves to first project: modern penthouse with city views. Slow pan across custom millwork, designer furniture, curated art. Match cut to coastal cottage: bright whites, natural textures, ocean-inspired palette. Transition through color to industrial loft: exposed brick, metal accents, vintage pieces. Corporate office design: productive spaces, brand integration, ergonomic solutions. Restaurant interior: atmospheric lighting, custom banquettes, artistic details. Each space revealed through signature elements: fabric swatches becoming curtains, paint chips transforming walls, mood boards materializing as rooms. End with designer's studio, projects on walls, creative process visible.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth pans, detail push-ins, creative transitions between projects
elements.subject: Multiple interior design projects showcasing range and expertise
elements.scene: Various designed interiors from residential to commercial
elements.motion: Flowing between spaces, focus pulls on details, reveal techniques
elements.lighting: Optimized for each space's intended mood and function

modifiedElements.subject: Multiple projects in one design style

bestPractices: Show both wide room shots and close-up details
Include process elements to show expertise
Maintain consistent color grading while showing variety
Credit furniture and fixture sources when possible

title: Aerial Estate Exploration
description: Drone footage showcasing property boundaries, landscapes, and architectural features from above

prompt.main: Dawn breaking, drone rises revealing expansive estate nestled in rolling hills. Circular orbit around main house showing all architectural angles, roof details, chimneys. Descending spiral toward pool area, water reflecting sky. Low altitude flight through tree canopy toward guest house. Rising to show property boundaries, neighboring context. Following driveway from gate to mansion, revealing approach experience. Tracking shots along horse paddocks, tennis court, gardens. Sunset position capturing golden light on facade, long shadows across manicured lawns. Night transition with landscape lighting illuminating paths, pool glowing blue. Final pull-back showing entire estate as jewel in landscape.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth drone movements, orbits, reveals, ascending/descending spirals
elements.subject: Luxury estate with extensive grounds and multiple structures
elements.scene: High-end property with landscaping, amenities, and natural features
elements.motion: Cinematic aerial choreography, parallax through trees
elements.lighting: Golden hour primary, blue hour conclusion, landscape lighting
elements.atmosphere: Grandeur, privacy, luxury lifestyle, natural beauty
elements.style: Cinematic aerial cinematography, luxury real estate marketing

bestPractices: Plan flight paths to reveal property progressively
Use elevation changes for dramatic effect
Include both wide establishing and detailed shots
Time flights for optimal lighting conditions

title: Day to Night Transition Showcase
description: Property ambiance through 24-hour cycle showing different moods and functionality

prompt.main: Pre-dawn establishing shot, house silhouetted against brightening sky. Sunrise through bedroom windows, golden light filling spaces. Morning: breakfast nook bathed in light, garden views. Day progression through static cameras: living room light shifting, shadows moving across floors. Afternoon: pool area at peak sunshine, outdoor spaces inviting. Golden hour: magical light through windows, interior warmth glowing. Sunset from terrace, sky painted in pastels. Blue hour: exterior lights activating, windows glowing warmly. Night: landscape lighting creating ambiance, interior scenes of comfort. City lights twinkling beyond. Full moon illuminating architecture. Time-lapse showing stars wheeling overhead, completing cycle.

elements.cameraMovement: Locked-off positions for time-lapse, occasional motion for transitions
elements.subject: Single property through complete day/night cycle
elements.scene: Residential or commercial property with good lighting design
elements.motion: Time-lapse acceleration, real-time moments at key times
elements.lighting: Full natural light cycle plus artificial lighting design
elements.style: Artistic time-lapse meets real estate showcase

bestPractices: Use consistent camera positions for smooth time-lapse
Capture key lighting moments: sunrise, sunset, blue hour
Show both interior and exterior transformations
Highlight architectural lighting design features

title: Virtual Reality Property Tour
description: 360-degree immersive walkthrough designed for VR headset viewing

prompt.main: 360-degree sphere opening in foyer, viewer can look anywhere. Natural walking pace through spaces, pausing at decision points. Living room: full sphere capture showing ceiling details, floor finishes. Kitchen: interactive hotspots on appliances, cabinets opening virtually. Master bedroom: comfortable pacing, view through windows in all directions. Bathroom: detailed fixtures, lighting options demonstrated. Basement: entertainment area, utility access clearly shown. Backyard: seamless indoor-outdoor transition, property boundaries visible. Spatial audio: footsteps, ambient room sounds, outdoor nature. Navigation prompts appear contextually. Measurement overlays available on demand. Multiple path options for non-linear exploration.

elements.cameraMovement: Steady walking pace, 360-degree capture, height matching average viewer
elements.subject: Complete property interior and exterior in immersive format
elements.scene: Fully staged property ready for virtual exploration
elements.motion: Natural walking speed, smooth transitions, no sudden movements
elements.lighting: Even lighting to avoid harsh shadows in 360 view
elements.style: VR real estate tour, interactive experience design

bestPractices: Maintain consistent eye-level height throughout
Avoid rapid movements that could cause VR sickness
Include spatial audio for enhanced immersion
Provide clear navigation cues for user orientation

title: Renovation Before & After Story
description: Dramatic transformation narrative showing renovation process and results

prompt.main: Opening: distressed property exterior, peeling paint, overgrown yard. Interior walk-through revealing dated fixtures, worn surfaces, cramped layout. Transition effect: walls becoming transparent showing new floor plan. Construction montage: walls coming down, new framing going up. Kitchen transformation: old cabinets dissolving, new ones materializing. Bathroom: dated tile cracking away revealing modern design. Split-screen progressions showing simultaneous before/after. Living spaces expanding with removed walls, light flooding in. Exterior transformation: new siding, landscaping time-lapse. Final reveal: completely renovated home, modern yet warm. Side-by-side comparisons of each room. Happy homeowners entering their transformed space.

elements.cameraMovement: Matching camera paths in before/after, split screens, wipe transitions
elements.subject: Single property through complete renovation journey
elements.motion: Transition effects, time-lapse construction, reveal moments

bestPractices: Use identical camera angles for true comparison
Show both problems and solutions clearly
Include emotional moments of revelation
Document key decision points and challenges overcome
